home.heroKicker: Bespoke Intelligent Solutions · Built for the Valley
home.heroBody: Across the Rio Grande Valley, we help businesses work smarter with AI, secure infrastructure, and human ingenuity — in English y en español.
home.announceTitle: BIS is open in the Rio Grande Valley to help local businesses harness AI.
home.announceBody: Enterprise-grade AI adoption, security modernization, and modern web design — right-sized for the businesses that keep the Valley running, through one point of contact.
home.svc1Body: We identify the workflows where AI can save you the most time, then build the custom tools to automate them.
home.svc2Body: Enterprise-grade security and cloud systems designed for the scale of high-growth Valley enterprises.
home.svc3Body: High-performance web applications that convert and communicate in both of our region's languages.
home.quote: Big-firm technology has never been out of reach for Valley businesses — it's just never been built for them. Bespoke means we start with your workflow, your customers, your two languages.
home.ctaTitle: Let's find your first hour back.
home.ctaBody: A free, no-pitch assessment: we look at how your business runs today and show you the one automation that pays for itself first.

services.title: What we do.
services.intro: Bespoke Intelligent Solutions for the modern enterprise. We bridge the gap between legacy IT and the frontier of AI.
services.g1Body: AI that removes real hours from your week — not demos that gather dust. We build practical, production-ready systems that integrate with your existing workforce.
services.g1Proof: Built AI case-intake summarization for a multi-office law firm — viability answers in minutes, not days.
services.g2Body: Twenty years of enterprise IT leadership. We don't just fix problems; we architect resilient environments that allow your firm to scale securely across borders.
services.g2Proof: Led cloud-only modernization for a 150-user firm across three offices in two countries.
services.g3Body: Fast, modern sites you actually own. No proprietary lock-in. No black boxes. Just clean, performant code that drives conversion and represents your brand's intelligence.
services.g3Proof: Every build ships with the keys: your hosting, your accounts, your ownership.
services.ctaTitle: Ready to deploy an intelligent solution?
services.ctaBody: Start with a free, no-pitch assessment and see the first automation that pays for itself.

industries.title: Built for the Valley.
industries.intro: High-performance AI engineering tailored specifically for the Rio Grande Valley's economic anchors. Modern systems designed to scale at the speed of the border.
industries.legalBody: AI-driven legal intake screens potential clients 24/7, delivering formatted, prioritized case data before the first cup of coffee.
industries.medBody: Automate scheduling, reminders, and bilingual patient intake so your staff spends time on care, not paperwork.
industries.logTitle: A head start on the corridor.
industries.logBody: Predictive systems and automated documentation keep freight moving across the border at the speed your customers expect.
industries.tradesBody: Modern sites and automations that capture leads, book jobs, and follow up — in both languages your customers speak.
industries.agBody: Connect operations, inventory, and reporting with practical AI built for the realities of Valley agriculture.
industries.ctaBody: If your business runs on repeatable work, we can probably automate part of it. Let's find out for free.

about.title: Who we are.
about.intro: Bespoke Intelligent Solutions brings enterprise-grade IT and AI consultancy to the businesses the giants overlook. We serve those who demand Brutal Intelligence and Strategic depth.
about.founderQuote: I built BIS because the gap between enterprise capability and local execution was widening. My mission is to bridge that divide with engineered precision.
about.founderBio: Dan Lopez is the architect behind Bespoke Intelligent Solutions. With a career forged in high-stakes global IT leadership, Dan returned to his roots in Harlingen with a singular vision: to bring sophisticated, enterprise-grade AI and IT consultancy to markets the giants overlook. His approach isn't one-size-fits-all — it's the 'Bespoke': a custom strategy that respects the unique DNA of every organization he partners with.
about.cred1Body: Two decades navigating complex technological shifts at the highest levels.
about.cred2Body: Multi-office logistics and architecture for global operations.
about.cred3Body: Advanced architecture for M365 ecosystems and security.
about.cred4Body: Deployment of Defender, Fortinet, and advanced threat protection.
about.cred5Body: Specializing in Claude integration and Power Automate workflows.
about.cred6Body: Optimizing platforms for legal compliance and high-performance CRM.
about.cred7Body: Fluent execution in English and Spanish for global reach.
about.cred8Body: World-class experience with deep local commitment.
about.m1Body: We map your current architecture to find the friction points and hidden opportunities for AI leverage.
about.m2Body: Strategy is a game of order. We map the deployment sequence for maximum ROI and minimum disruption.
about.m3Body: Execution is precision. We develop custom integrations and AI workflows tailored to your operational DNA.
about.m4Body: We empower your team to own the solution: documentation, training, and a sustainable roadmap for growth.
about.ctaBody: Start with a free, no-pitch assessment. We'll show you the one automation that pays for itself first.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.metaDescription: Answers about how Bespoke Intelligent Solutions helps Rio Grande Valley businesses with AI, IT security, and bilingual web design.
faq.intro: Straight answers about how we work, what we build, and how to get started.

whatIsBis.q: What does Bespoke Intelligent Solutions do?
whatIsBis.a: We're an IT and AI consultancy for Rio Grande Valley businesses. We help you adopt practical AI, modernize and secure your IT, and build fast bilingual websites — with one point of contact from strategy through delivery.

whoServe.a: Small and mid-sized Valley businesses — including legal, medical and dental, logistics and freight, skilled trades, and agriculture. Everything we do is fully bilingual in English and Spanish.

bespoke.q: What does “bespoke” mean for my business?
bespoke.a: It means we start with your workflow, your customers, and your two languages — not a template. We recommend only what earns its keep, and we build it to fit how you actually operate.

aiPractical.q: Is AI actually practical for a business my size?
aiPractical.a: Yes. We focus on removing real hours from your week — automating intake, scheduling, follow-ups, and document handling — not flashy demos. If a task is repeatable, there's usually a piece of it we can automate.

aiCost.q: How much does AI cost, and what's the return?
aiCost.a: It varies by scope, but we target automations that pay for themselves in saved time. The free assessment identifies the single automation with the fastest payback so you can start small and prove the value.

dataHandling.q: How do you handle our data and confidentiality?
dataHandling.a: We treat your data as confidential, work under an NDA when you want one, use least-privilege access, and prefer tools that keep your data in your own accounts. You own your systems and your data — always.

compliance.q: Do you work with regulated fields like legal and healthcare?
compliance.a: Yes. We're security-first and privacy-aware for fields like legal and medical/dental, and we design workflows with confidentiality and data protection in mind. We're not a substitute for your compliance counsel, but we build to support it.

ownWebsite.q: Do we own our website and accounts?
ownWebsite.a: Completely. Every build ships with the keys: your hosting, your domain, your accounts. No proprietary lock-in, no black boxes — clean code you can hand to anyone.

webWhat.q: What kind of web work do you do?
webWhat.a: Fast, modern, bilingual sites and web apps that convert — with native English/Spanish content, local SEO for the RGV, and analytics so you can see what's working.

howStart.a: Book a free, no-pitch assessment. We look at how your business runs today and show you the one improvement that pays for itself first. No obligation.

pricing.q: How do you price your work?
pricing.a: Most engagements are scoped to a fixed proposal after the free assessment, so you know the cost before we start. We right-size to your business rather than selling a one-size package.

remote.q: Do you work remotely or on-site?
remote.a: Both. We're based in Harlingen and serve the entire Valley, so we can work on-site when it helps and remotely when that's faster — whatever gets you results.

serviceArea.title: Service Area — The Rio Grande Valley
serviceArea.metaDescription: Bespoke Intelligent Solutions serves businesses across the Rio Grande Valley — Harlingen, McAllen, Brownsville, Edinburg, and beyond — with AI, IT security, and bilingual web design.
serviceArea.heading: Serving the whole Rio Grande Valley
serviceArea.intro: We're based in Harlingen and work with businesses across the Valley — on-site when it helps, remote when that's faster.
serviceArea.whyLocalBody: Enterprise-grade technology has always been built for somewhere else. We build for here — for the Valley's two languages, its cross-border rhythm, and the businesses that keep it running. Being local means we understand your customers, and we're a short drive away when you need us.
serviceArea.ctaTitle: Let's find your first hour back.
serviceArea.ctaBody: Book a free, no-pitch assessment — wherever you are in the Valley.
